title: betula verrucosa var. arbuscula
intro: Betula verrucosa var. arbuscula, also known as the Dwarf Birch, is a small deciduous shrub or tree belonging to the Betulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of the Dwarf Birch offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
